lead_profile_text: STL Switch from long-let HMO. 5-bed furnished HMO at 10 Water Tower Street, Chester CH1 2AE. Let to students for 15 years, always furnished. Currently generating ~£2,500/month (£30,000/year LTL). Mortgage recently doubled — primary driver for exploring STL. Two students wanting to stay on (need contract resolution). Comparing 3 short-let management companies with a self-imposed 2-week decision deadline.
emotional_profile: Rational, commercially-focused, analytical decision-maker. Mortgage pressure is primary conversion driver. Methodical — comparing 3 operators. Biggest stated concern: cleaning quality at a 5-bed. Self-imposed 2-week deadline driven by student contract resolution.
delay_trigger_phrases: I have two students wanting to stay on
I'm comparing three companies before deciding
I have two weeks to decide
delay_timeline: 2-week self-imposed deadline (~9 July 2026); student contracts need resolving before STL transition
green_light_trigger_phrases: I have two weeks to decide

top_objections.text: Cleaning quality is my biggest concern — how are standards maintained consistently at a 5-bed?
top_objections.zac_response: Vetted local contractors coordinated centrally by Stayful. Regular property inspections 2-4 times per year.

top_objections.text: May should be higher because of Chester Race Week — are projections capturing this demand spike?
top_objections.zac_response: Summer months June-August typically outperform and are reflected in projections. Race Week demand captured in peak summer figures.

top_objections.text: Party/nuisance guest risk at a 5-bed property
top_objections.zac_response: No stag/hen policy in place. £500 security deposit per stay. ID checks on all guests. Optional noise/decibel sensor + WiFi device count monitor.

top_objections.text: Ramp-up achievability — comparable listings average 4.8 stars and 140 reviews
top_objections.zac_response: ~90% of projected revenue achievable within first few months. Full market rates after ~1 year once reviews accumulate.

top_objections.text: Comparing three short-let management companies — need to assess fee, service, and performance
top_objections.zac_response: Proactively offered competitor comparison spreadsheet. 13% + VAT offer vs standard 15%.

top_questions.text: How does Stayful maintain cleaning quality at a large 5-bed property?
top_questions.answer: Vetted local contractors coordinated centrally. Regular property inspections 2-4 times per year depending on review trends or guest queries.

top_questions.text: Does Chester Race Week feature in the income projections?
top_questions.answer: Summer months (June-August) typically outperform and are reflected in projections. Race Week demand should be captured in peak summer figures.

top_questions.text: How does Stayful prevent problem/party guests at a 5-bed?
top_questions.answer: No stag/hen policy. £500 security deposit per stay. ID checks on all guests. Optional noise/decibel sensor and WiFi device count monitor available.

top_questions.text: Are revenue projections realistic for a new listing with no reviews?
top_questions.answer: ~90% of projected revenue achievable within first few months. Full market rates after ~1 year once reviews build. New listings get an algorithm boost initially.

top_questions.text: Do you have a direct booking channel or is it all OTA?
top_questions.answer: Listed on Airbnb, Booking.com, and Stayful's own direct booking website. Strong direct booking rate especially for longer-stay guests.

what_moved_them: Cleaning coordination approach — vetted local contractors centrally managed
No stag/hen policy + £500 security deposit + ID checks — comprehensive guest vetting
Direct booking website capability — reduces platform dependency
Chester described as 'one of the best short-let markets in the country'
13% + VAT offer acknowledged on call as meaningful
what_fell_flat: Chester Race Week not explicitly itemised in projections — minor residual concern

conversion_gaps.gap: Cleaning quality specifics not provided — no Chester contractor names or evidence of track record
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send Chester-specific cleaning contractor details or case study in follow-up. Reference portfolio properties managed in Chester if any.

conversion_gaps.gap: Competitor comparison outcome unknown — Stewart is evaluating 3 operators
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send proactively promised competitor comparison spreadsheet. Highlight direct booking channel as differentiator.

conversion_gaps.gap: Student tenancy needs resolving before STL transition can begin
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Timelines align — 2-week decision deadline matches offer expiry. Student resolution and contract signing can proceed in parallel.

offer_framing: 13% + VAT, expires 10 July 2026. Annual saving vs standard 15% + VAT: ~£1,893/year at projected Y2 net income.
zac_income_intro: Annual gross £94,668 at 54% occupancy, £478/night average. Annual net to owner £49,227/year (~£4,102/month). Monthly range ~£3,112 (Jan) to £5,641 (Aug). LTL comparison £27,000/year (£2,250/month). STL uplift: £22,229/year. Year 1 conservative (80% ramp): £39,383 net.
zac_reassurance_phrases: Chester is one of the best short-let markets in the country given its size and location
No stag/hen policy, £500 security deposit, ID checks on all guests
~90% of projected revenue achievable within first few months; full market rates after ~1 year
rent_mortgage: ~£2,500/month current LTL income; mortgage amount recently doubled (not stated on call)
